metadata.title: Product Experiences
metadata.description: Outcome-based product experiences for the Digital News Publishing Platform domain, covering audience growth, premium reading, publishing operations, and commercial monetization.

definitions.productBrick: A reusable implementation-facing building block used to realize one or more product experiences.
definitions.productCapability: A high-level, outcome-based experience that delivers customer or business value.

metadata.flowModelNote: Each experience carries only experience-specific flows. Each flow step lists the bricks and external systems used inside that experience.

capabilities.name: Return Directly for the Next Story
capabilities.description: Help readers come back directly and quickly find the next worthwhile story.

flows.title: Return Directly for the Next Story
flows.description: From direct entry into an efficient reading session.

dependencies.name: Front Door and Homepage Orchestration
dependencies.description: Editorial and algorithmic assembly of homepages, section fronts, landing pages, and app front doors.
dependencies.how: Presents a current and useful first screen.

steps.title: Follow the most relevant next links

dependencies.name: Personalization and Recirculation
dependencies.description: Audience-aware ranking, next-story suggestions, and return-journey orchestration across surfaces.
dependencies.how: Turns one click into a more coherent session.

dependencies.name: Newsletter Lifecycle Management
dependencies.description: Newsletter curation, audience targeting, send orchestration, and performance feedback.
dependencies.how: Creates repeat return loops from inbox to owned surfaces.

capabilities.name: Convert Repeat Readers into Known Users
capabilities.description: Turn anonymous repeat traffic into recognized audience relationships with clearer long-term value.

flows.title: Convert Repeat Readers into Known Users

dependencies.name: Registration and Known User Growth
dependencies.description: Registration prompts, account creation flows, and reader-value exchange for becoming known.
dependencies.how: Converts repeat use into account creation when value is obvious.

dependencies.name: Identity and Account Platform
dependencies.description: Account, login, session, and profile infrastructure for readers, subscribers, and partners.
dependencies.how: Keeps the relationship durable across visits.

dependencies.name: Consent and Privacy Controls
dependencies.description: Consent capture, policy enforcement, and privacy-safe activation controls across reader and advertiser flows.
dependencies.how: Makes the known relationship legally and operationally usable.

capabilities.name: Deliver Premium Reading Worth Renewing
capabilities.description: Make subscriber value concrete across articles, editions, bundles, and premium extras.

flows.title: Deliver Premium Reading Worth Renewing
flows.description: From offer understanding to repeated premium use.

dependencies.name: Subscription and Paywall Experience
dependencies.description: Paywall decisioning, premium packaging, entitlement checks, and upsell flows.
dependencies.how: Makes premium value and access legible.

dependencies.name: Partner Bundles and Wholesale Subscriptions
dependencies.description: Wholesale subscription packaging, partner entitlement sync, and bundle lifecycle management.
dependencies.how: Makes partner-distributed premium access usable.

dependencies.name: Article and Story Experience
dependencies.description: Core reading experience for articles, galleries, explainers, and premium stories.
dependencies.how: Delivers the premium reading experience itself.

dependencies.name: Billing and Revenue Operations
dependencies.description: Subscription billing, renewals, settlement, and monetization exception handling across direct and partner channels.
dependencies.how: Prevents renewals and billing from becoming churn triggers.

capabilities.name: Publish Breaking News Fast
capabilities.description: Help the newsroom move from story-ready to multi-channel publication quickly and safely.

flows.title: Publish Breaking News Fast
flows.description: From editorial readiness to multi-surface launch.

steps.title: Author and verify the core story

dependencies.name: CMS and Workflow Orchestration
dependencies.description: Authoring, editing, approvals, publish-state control, and newsroom workflow orchestration.
dependencies.how: Coordinates the core story and approvals.

dependencies.name: Asset Management and Rights
dependencies.description: Media asset storage, metadata, rights handling, and safe reuse controls.
dependencies.how: Keeps media and rights state ready to publish.

dependencies.name: Story Packaging and Merchandising
dependencies.description: Creation of reusable story packages with headlines, decks, links, metadata, and monetization-ready fields.
dependencies.how: Creates a reusable package from the canonical story.

dependencies.name: Distribution Packaging and Syndication
dependencies.description: Destination-specific publishing for search, social, app, newsletters, partners, and other external surfaces.
dependencies.how: Launches the package across downstream surfaces.

capabilities.name: Extend One Story Across Formats
capabilities.description: Turn one editorial asset into a reusable package for homepage, app, newsletters, search, social, and video.

flows.title: Extend One Story Across Formats
flows.description: From canonical story to portfolio-wide presence.

dependencies.name: Story Packaging and Merchandising
dependencies.description: Creation of reusable story packages with headlines, decks, links, metadata, and monetization-ready fields.
dependencies.how: Creates a destination-ready package.

dependencies.name: Front Door and Homepage Orchestration
dependencies.description: Editorial and algorithmic assembly of homepages, section fronts, landing pages, and app front doors.
dependencies.how: Positions the story where readers start.

dependencies.name: Video and Visual Storytelling
dependencies.description: Short-form and embedded video, visual explainers, and cross-channel media storytelling.
dependencies.how: Extends the same story into visual and social formats.

capabilities.name: Sell and Run Premium Campaigns
capabilities.description: Turn advertiser briefs into well-targeted, well-delivered campaigns across the portfolio.

dependencies.name: Audience Segmentation and Yield
dependencies.description: Creation of commercial audience products, inventory pricing logic, and yield-aware segment packaging.
dependencies.how: Turns a brief into targetable commercial audience definitions.

dependencies.name: Advertising Operations and Delivery
dependencies.description: Campaign booking, pacing, delivery, policy controls, and advertiser operational workflows.
dependencies.how: Runs the campaign operationally.

dependencies.name: Analytics, Measurement, and Insight
dependencies.description: Shared KPI definitions, reporting, audience insight, and commercial measurement across the domain.
dependencies.how: Makes outcomes legible enough for renewal decisions.

capabilities.name: Package Sponsored and Commerce Value
capabilities.description: Monetize high-intent audiences through branded storytelling, commerce, and bundle extensions without weakening trust.

flows.title: Package Sponsored and Commerce Value
flows.description: From editorial trust to broader monetization extensions.

dependencies.name: Commercial Studio and Sponsored Content
dependencies.description: Sponsored storytelling, branded packages, and commercial creative operations for portfolio advertisers.
dependencies.how: Turns editorial strengths into brand-safe sponsored experiences.

steps.title: Extend into commerce, bundles, or experiences

dependencies.name: Affiliate Commerce and eCommerce
dependencies.description: Commerce links, shopping experiences, commission tracking, and editorial-commerce optimization.
dependencies.how: Monetizes high-intent content through commerce.

dependencies.name: Partner Bundles and Wholesale Subscriptions
dependencies.description: Wholesale subscription packaging, partner entitlement sync, and bundle lifecycle management.
dependencies.how: Creates recurring revenue through wholesale distribution.

capabilities.name: Run a Trusted First-Party Data Loop
capabilities.description: Connect audience identity, consent, measurement, and experiments so reader and advertiser value compounds safely.
outcomes: Higher experimentation velocity with trusted metrics

flows.title: Run a Trusted First-Party Data Loop
flows.description: From audience recognition to governed measurement and decisions.

steps.title: Recognize users and govern data use

dependencies.name: Identity and Account Platform
dependencies.description: Account, login, session, and profile infrastructure for readers, subscribers, and partners.
dependencies.how: Provides the account and session layer for recognition.

dependencies.name: Consent and Privacy Controls
dependencies.description: Consent capture, policy enforcement, and privacy-safe activation controls across reader and advertiser flows.
dependencies.how: Controls which data can be used and where.

dependencies.name: Analytics, Measurement, and Insight
dependencies.description: Shared KPI definitions, reporting, audience insight, and commercial measurement across the domain.
dependencies.how: Defines trusted metrics and insights.

dependencies.name: Experimentation and Decisioning
dependencies.description: A/B testing, decision flags, and controlled rollout support across reader, commercial, and editorial journeys.
dependencies.how: Turns trusted measurement into controlled product decisions.
